Bullet Point 2: ❤️100% Natural, Non-GMO, No Preservatives, Vegan, Gluten Friendly, PREMIUM Gourmet Food Grade Spice.

Bullet Point 4: ❤️Packed in a no barrier Plastic Bag, let us tell you how important that is when using high quality Indian Spices! Rani is a USA based company selling spices for over 40 years, buy with confidence!
Bullet Point 5: ❤️Net Wt. 3.5oz (100g) Product of India, Alternate Names: Elachi, Kali Elachi (Hindi), Big Cardamom
Product Description: Native to the Eastern Himalayan regions, Black Cardamom is a large brown pod containing highly aromatic seeds. Unlike green pods this cardamom is rarely used in deserts and sweet dishes. It is a staple spice used in African, Indian and Middle Eastern cooking. It has a unique smoky flavor and is used in Basmati rice and stew type dishes. Black cardamom should be used sparingly due to its intense and rich flavor.

Unit: Ounce

The packaging emphasizes quality and authenticity, with a clear indication of Indian origin and a 40-year brand legacy. The product is positioned as a high-end spice for culinary use, justifying a higher price point due to its specialty nature and targeted use in gourmet dishes.
